caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a background of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that reads "Stay Authentic". A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. The man's right arm, which is heavily tattooed, is visible. Over the sequence of frames, he moves his right hand from the side of his head up to touch the top of his scalp. His facial expression remains relatively neutral, though his mouth opens slightly as if he is speaking. The camera remains static, capturing him from the chest up as he interacts with his head while positioned before the recording equipment.
